---
subparagraph: yes
geometry:
  - top=20mm
  - left=20mm
  - right=20mm
  - bottom=20mm
format:
    quarto-cv-pdf: 
        keep-tex: true
        pdf-engine: lualatex
author: Frederick J. Boehm
date: last-modified
engine: jupyter
---



# Mentoring Experience

\hrule

```{python} 
import yaml

# Read YAML file
with open("data/mentoring.yaml", "r") as file:
    data = yaml.safe_load(file)

# Select elements
first_person_name = data['people'][0]['name']
```

```{python} 
#| eval: true
from datetime import datetime

# Input date as a string
date_string = "2015-05-01"

# Parse the string into a datetime object
date_object = datetime.strptime(date_string, "%Y-%m-%d")

# Format the date as "Month Year"
formatted_date = date_object.strftime("%B %Y")

print(formatted_date)

```

```{python}
for person in data['people']:
    print(f"My name is: {person['name']}\n\n")
```

```{python}
from IPython.display import display, Markdown

for person in data['people']:
    display(Markdown(f"My name is: {person['name']}"))
```

**code wrapping in quarto pdf output** see: https://github.com/quarto-dev/quarto-cli/discussions/4121
Of course, for the cv pdf, I probably just want to hide code!!
